title: Gol Storn
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Gol Storn''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ship [[Battle of Galantos|sent]] to [[Galantos]] with the ''[[Thackery]]'' to protect it from the [[Yevetha]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]
